title: How a perfectly even universe grew galaxies - Adam Brown
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews cosmologist Adam Brown on how density fluctuations in an initially homogeneous universe led to galaxy formation. The discussion covers gravitational instability and the amplification of primordial perturbations into large-scale structure.
